text.title: db-chroma Core Rules
text.summary: Migrated testable rules for db-chroma. Verify and refine before relying on for production.

rule.statement: Set the distance metric at collection creation time; it cannot be changed without recreating the collection.
rule.rationale: Chroma bakes the metric into the HNSW index. Changing it later requires a full data migration.

rule.statement: Always use string IDs; integer IDs must be stringified before passing to Chroma.
rule.rationale: Chroma enforces string-typed IDs; passing integers causes a type error.

rule.statement: Convert Chroma distances to similarity scores before returning to callers: similarity = 1 - distance for cosine space.
rule.rationale: Chroma returns distances (lower = more similar) not similarity scores (higher = more similar). Callers expect similarity semantics.
